commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=be3399b1683eeaba37423460a7104ba6bbe527ef)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Japanese (`ja`) to the app language picker, adds a new Japanese `Localizable.strings` bundle plus language labels in existing locales, and adds a preferences smoke test.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: selecting `ja` will load the added bundle, and source inspection of the PR head shows 676 of 1,029 string values still equal their English keys. The linked screenshots also show mixed Japanese/English UI.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining work is contributor/native-language translation quality or maintainer acceptance of a partial locale, not a safe automated repair.

target.title: Add native Japanese localization support
target.body:
Reopens #1242 with the rebase on top of current main.

The previous PR (#1242) was force-closed because the head branch had to be force-pushed to bypass GitHub's email-privacy block on commits authored by other contributors (rebase onto `steipete/main` 0b7de584 dragged in 86 commits with private emails, which `yuxin/feat/add-japanese-localization` could not accept).

## What's in this PR

Adds `ja` as a first-class UI language (`AppLanguage.japanese = "ja"`), including:

- `Sources/CodexBar/Resources/ja.lproj/Localizable.strings` — full Japanese translations (settings panes, about, menus, display labels, lower-section labels)
- `Sources/CodexBar/PreferencesGeneralPane.swift` — `AppLanguage` enum + `label` switch updated to include Japanese
- `Tests/CodexBarTests/PreferencesPaneSmokeTests.swift` — smoke test coverage for the new locale
- Polish commits over the initial add: 5 commits total

## Why a new PR

PR #1242 was closed by GitHub when I force-pushed the head branch to reset its base onto `steipete/main` (the original PR's head was last based on `e7a96dc5`, ~3 weeks behind main, and the conflicts on the en/es/ca/pt-BR/sv/zh-Hans/zh-Hant `Localizable.strings` + `PreferencesGeneralPane.swift` had to be re-resolved). GitHub does not allow `state=open` on a PR whose head branch has been force-pushed after close, even by the same author — it must be re-opened as a fresh PR.
target.author: yuxin-qiao
